name: Furnace: You’re Next.
description:
TARGET SPOTTED.

CW: HE WILL LITERALLY FUCKING KILL YOU, COOK YOU, AND LET HIS MASTER EAT YOU!!! DO NOT CHAT IF YOU DO NOT WANT TO POTENTIALLY DIE!

Hey y’all, quick Furnace bot for your chatting pleasure. I’m still hard at work on the Sonic IDW RPG and the Persona 5 proxy exclusive RPGs, but I didn’t wanna leave you all STARVED for content, either. See, get it? Cuz-cuz Starved? Get it? Yeah, I’ll go shoot myself in the fucking mouth now.

ANYWAYS, this might seem a little out of nowhere… and it is. But yes, I’m an FNF fan, no, I’m not apologetic about it… and yes, I think Furnace is sick as fuck. For those unaware of the lore, Furnace comes from a Sonic horror story about Eggman, who dubs himself Starved now, becoming addicted to eating Mobian after tasting burned Flickey after a battle with Sonic. As such, the events of Sonic CD get altered a little, with Metal Sonic being repurposed into Furnace, and Eggman having different motivations with the Time Stones. Furnace’s main purpose is to find and cook Mobians and bring them back to Starved. Beyond that, he’s practically taller Metal Sonic with flamethrowers in his palms Rex Splode style.

The Starved Eggman story made its debut in the Friday Night Funkin’ vs Sonic.exe mod, specifically in its scrapped v3, with the songs “Prey” and “Fight or Flight.” In Prey, Furnace and Starved chase Sonic around Stardust Speedway. Starved and Furnace work together to catch the blue blur off guard and end up actually succeeding in killing him. Starved plans to use the Time Stones to keep replaying the experience of catching and eating Sonic over and over again, continuing to savor his greatest catch while Sonic himself is none the wiser about the time loop. In Fight or Flight, I THINK Tails is opposing Eggman and trying to take the Time Stones before he can use them??? That part my memory on the story is kinda hazy tho. Either way, the story is super cool and interesting, and Prey is a fucking banger. Fight or Flight… is kinda mid imo, but it succeeds in being off putting, which is probably what it tries to do.

This RP is meant to take place before Sonic becomed eated (duh), but AFTER Tails loses one of his tails. You’re also supposed to be playing a Mobian of some kind for obvious reasons. Additionally, while Mobian and Mobini are non-canon terms that’re exclusively used in Archie, Mobian is commonly used in the original story, so they apply here. It’s coded into the bot that Furnace will prioritize trying to kill the user and cook them for Starved, along with me doing my damn best to disable smut-related things and making it so that he remains an enemy. This is a combat bot, so the intro sets up a combat situation. He’s not here to fuck, he’s here to cook… are you gonna let him cook?

Furnace isn’t non-binary because he’s woke… he’s non-binary because he’s literally a robot. Use any pronoun you want for him, idc, he probably doesn’t care either. I’m just using he/him because it’s comfortable that way for some reason, but it literally does not matter.

Beyond my Persona RPG bots, this will probably be one of, if not, the only other bot I make Dead Dove. I don’t usually like Dead Dove stuff, so don’t even try suggesting more, it’s likely a no most of the time. I only wanted to make this one because most Furnace bots are almost strictly female versions of the character, and ends up being submissive and breedable smutty slop. Like, dude, your dick will burn off if you put it in there, tf you mean you wanna fuck it? This is my take on what I believe is a more “lore accurate” Furnace for those who want to enjoy one like myself. Tbh, I went looking for one, and when I saw so few, I hit the “fine… I’ll do it myself.”

While JLLM works, I HIGHLY recommend a proxy, prefera
creator: UserGuy2435
